steps.title: Find the shared status
steps.content: The prompt asks for a similarity between The Prophet and The Professor's House. The relevant notes say that both works entered the public domain, though in different years. A correct response must make the two books joint examples of that shared status rather than focus on only one work.

steps.title: Reject contrasts and one-book focus
steps.content: A uses unlike, which emphasizes a difference in timing instead of a similarity. C contrasts the works' genres. D discusses only The Professor's House and leaves out The Prophet. None of those choices presents the shared public-domain trait. The answer is B.
